title: Deep Suite Extensions Sidecar Manifest
description: Cross-plugin metadata for the deep-suite marketplace. NOT read by Claude Code; consumed by suite tooling only. See schemas/README.md.

^x-.description: Reserved forward-compat extension namespace at root level. Validators ignore content; producers may use freely without bumping schema_version.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint; ignored at validate time.

schema_version.description: Locked to 1.0 for v1. Forward-compat additions go through `x-*` patternProperties (defined at root, suite, and plugin entry levels). Breaking changes require a new schema file (suite-extensions-v2.schema.json) per schemas/README.md.

^x-.description: Reserved forward-compat extension namespace inside suite block.

name.description: Marketplace name (strict kebab-case). Must equal marketplace.json.name.

harness_taxonomy.description: Reference taxonomy used for capability classification (e.g., 'boeckeler-2026').

^[a-z][a-z0-9]*(-[a-z0-9]+)*$.$comment: Strict kebab-case: lowercase-alnum + single hyphens between segments. Rejects PascalCase, leading/trailing hyphen, double hyphen (e.g., 'deep-', 'deep--work'), and digit-leading names.

data_flow.description: Cross-plugin artifact dependencies. Each edge identifies producer → consumer + a human-readable transport label. NOTE: JSON Schema cannot express that `from`/`to` reference an existing `plugins` key — that referential integrity is enforced by the validator CLI (scripts/validate-suite-extensions.js) as a post-schema phase. `via` is a DISPLAY-ONLY label (Option 1 per handoff §5); it is not validated against artifact paths. **Non-authoritative**: this graph captures intent / primary flows, not every cross-plugin read or write. Machine-readable cross-plugin truth lives in M3 envelope (`run_id` / `parent_run_id`). See schemas/README.md §`data_flow is intent-only, not exhaustive`.

from.description: Producer plugin key. Referential check: must equal a `plugins` key (validator Phase 2).

to.description: Consumer plugin key. Referential check: must equal a `plugins` key (validator Phase 2).

via.description: Human-readable transport label. NOT validated against `artifacts.writes`/`reads` — display-only. Compound labels are acceptable (e.g., 'session-receipt + harness-sessions.jsonl').

^x-.description: Reserved forward-compat extension namespace per plugin entry.

hooks_intentionally_empty_reason.description: Required when hooks_active is [] AND the plugin's hooks/hooks.json has "hooks": {}. Documents trust-boundary intent (e.g., 'Evaluator는 user-invocation 기반 trust-boundary 설계').
